description: The FZK-Haus residential building IFC model is pre-loaded in Bonsai/BlenderBIM. You are a Building Surveyor conducting a condition assessment of the property. Document defective elements for a remediation contractor by creating an IfcGroup named 'Defect Remediation' containing at least 3 walls and 1 slab. Enrich these elements with a 'Pset_Condition' property set where 'AssessmentCondition' is set to 'Poor' and 'AssessmentDescription' details the defect. Save the enriched IFC project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_condition_assessment.ifc.
